feed.title: AO3 - Trans Tim Drake (DCU) (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Trans Tim Drake (DCU) on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: You're gonna go far, kid
entry.summary:
Author: Piratecoreart

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,902Chapters: 1/?Kudos: 0

Summary: (A strange peace seemed to come over Tim, his fear melting, his body relaxing. "Oh," he said, and to Jason's utter shock, he crawled forwarded, dragging his battered body to meet Jason on the ground. He reached, touching Jason's face with a trembling, bloody, tiny hand, and said, "Am I dying, then?") When Jason finds a broken bird, eerily familiar to when his own wings were clipped, what can he do but try and intervene? Or: Tim becomes Jason's sidekick, and the dynamic duo is reborn as Villains

entry.summary:
Author: thewhimsicalwise

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 301Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 1

entry.title: Violet Birds in Emerald Skies
entry.summary:
Author: Niveara

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 83,766Chapters: 25/?Kudos: 959

Summary: Hal.exe stopped working. This child, this Sparrow, was THE Sparrow? Like the Champion of Predator, Wielder of Violet Light, Paragon of Love, Sparrow? The Star Sapphire with ‘rings for eyes’ that Kilowog, Green Lantern 1-9-8-6, was always going on and on about? The individual Carol, Star Sapphire 1-9-6-2, was always saying was a 'stain’ against the Zamaron’s Star Sapphires Corps?But they were just an itty bitty little baby.“You’re joking right” he teased assuming this was just Sinestro trying his hand at humor “please tell me your joking. Surely a 6 year old human child isn’t THE Sparrow”“You are correct” Sinestro agreed flatly a small smile forming upon his face as Hal relaxed at his response “a 6 year old human child is not THE Sparrow”“Oh thank-“ Hal started only to get cut off as Sinestro finished his thoughts.“It is my understanding that the child is only 4 and a half”ORTim Drake becomes a Star Sapphire shortly after watching the Flying Graysons fall. This has consequences.

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,479Chapters: 2/4Kudos: 179

entry.title: The Bar
entry.summary:
Author: Anonymous

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,098Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 38

Summary: "Go to hell," Tim grits out. Sionis just laughs. "I don't like your attitude, bitch," he says, taking a step back and shoving his hands in his pockets. "What do you boys think?" "You should teach her to mind her manners," Robbie agrees with a wolfish grin, the others laughing their approval. Sionis studies Tim another moment, then gestures the men forward. "Gag the bitch and bring her to the bar."_____Tim gets caught while undercover in a club owned by Black Mask.

entry.title: Left Me on the Wayside
entry.summary:
Author: sk3tch3s_and_fanfics

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,537Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 15

Summary: In which Tim Drake is left in Burbank while the Waynes were on a business trip. Luckily for him, he's found by a kindly Warner Bros. Studio Lot nurse, who helps him until Bruce can come get him.

entry.title: girlhood (in a box)
entry.summary:
Author: Wyvering

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 16,702Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 213

Summary: Tim’s a boy. He’s been a boy his whole life, even though being a boy makes his skin itch and his stomach turn and his heart ache. Tim is a boy, but maybe he doesn’t have to be. — Tim’s a girl, she just doesn’t know it yet.

entry.title: Catgirls Can Have A Little Theft, As A Treat
entry.summary:
Author: atomicpanda

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 91,391Chapters: 58/?Kudos: 513

Summary: Waking up as a tween catgirl in the DCU, a self insert into Gotham experiences the thrills of the masked nightlife, fails to combat her new urge to steal, and fails to combat her new feline instincts, all while working towards her goal of bringing good music to a Deathworld. Armed with the power of adorableness and also a deck of cards that hold a unique path to Power, Allison "AlleyKat" Kyle may not shake the world, but she sure as heck is going to knock it off the ledge.

entry.title: Rogue Kitten
entry.summary:
Author: scribblebugsstuff

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 17,008Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 94

Summary: Baby Tim's parents left him alone while they go on their longest trip without him yet. This is the story of how the unsupervised chaos child manages to get surprise adopted by the Sirens and the ensuing hijinks and shenanigans This is the first fic I've ever written and it's been rattling around in my brain for months until I spat this out. Enjoy :)

entry.title: If no one’s coming to save you, no one’s coming to stop you
entry.summary:
Author: artistic_aerialist

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,141Chapters: 6/?Kudos: 225

Summary: Tim would like to reiterate that his family's support for Damian gender identity was the bare minimum, except he absolutely refused for the the thought of Tim copying his (literal) backstabbing demon of a younger sibling to even cross the mind of anyone. He would not be announcing the fact that he, too, is transgender. If he came out to Bruce, the chances are Bruce would get him testosterone within the next month, and top surgery consultations within the next week. He'd probably even organise bottom surgery in a couple of years if Tim wanted it. However that would require the key step of telling Bruce. Ew. That was an unnecessary step. Tim could do this himself. OR Coming out is optional, and Tim decides to pick the option of “let everyone else figure it out by themselves,” so he goes and does his own hrt and top surgery and stuff

entry.title: Young Just Us (Against The World)
entry.summary:
Author: Bullshark_Kid

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 3,595Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 101

Summary: A few months after Batman's abuse, the Bats sent Tim off to join the team, Young Justice. Secrets get revealed, couches get burnt, two evil scientists become best friends, a toaster gains sentience, and unbreakable bonds are formed. Or: The Chaos Crew has finally arrived.

entry.title: I see your sunshine
entry.summary:
Author: white_zane

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 10,026Chapters: 10/10Kudos: 83

Summary: Did you ever think about detransitioning simply because you knew that it would kill you faster than any bullet ever could?He never actually said any of that out loud. He didn’t write it down either, afraid to make all of it real, afraid that he wouldn’t be heard anyway even if he put all of it out of there. Because usually he was fine, you know?Tim had never been a girl, but he couldn’t quite be a man either, no matter how hard he tried, he couldn’t fit into anything.A girl to most, a boy only to those that bothered to listen to him for more than five seconds. Or: Tim has been out as a Transman for some years now, but he feels like he never really got anywhere in his transition. Meanwhile, Damian starts thinking about who he is if he's more than a trained weapon designed to kill people.

  • Creator Chose Not To Use Archive Warnings

entry.title: Never a daughter, Never a sister
entry.summary:
Author: timdrakegivesmegenderenvy

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,932Chapters: 8/10Kudos: 112

Summary: How Tim Drake came out to each family member :3 (this is VERY MUCH just for me, i LOVE trans tim content) ps the only canon i’ve read is the first batgirls comic, batman legends of the dark knight, all 4 knightfight comics and the wayne family adventures webtoon, 99% of this is fanon.

  • Cassandra Cain & Tim Drake & Dick Grayson & Duke Thomas & Jason Todd & Bruce Wayne & Damian Wayne

entry.title: I'm not a man, not in these heels.
entry.summary:
Author: Vender_Nyx

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,469Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 13

Summary: When you're little you don't quite understand much about the world. You love certain things but also hate certain things. There was definitely something about someone feeling off in the body they were given. But internally in the mind they don't really correct it until they start feeling comfortable.

entry.title: Tim Drake's Guardian Angel
entry.summary:
Author: n4tcrack3r

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 51,092Chapters: 14/?Kudos: 316

Summary: Someone is stalking Tim Drake.This would be worrisome, if Tim didn’t know who it was. If he didn’t know who it was, it would be someone smart enough to evade Red Robin, the Bat’s third partner who had wormed his way into the dangerous life of a vigilante, who had proven himself time and time again to be a threateningly intelligent and formidable enemy.But he knew who it was, so he wasn’t worried. He was terrified.Or: Tim Drake comes into (unwilling) contact with an old adversary and has to relive past (and present) trauma.

entry.title: you're a good brother
entry.summary:
Author: DairyFarmer

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,904Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 181

Summary: Dick tried talking to Jason, tried pleading. It didn’t work. Jason was angry. Angrier than Dick had ever seen him. "I knew I should've pulled the plug ages ago, I knew it's what Timmy would've wanted- you people never gave a shit about what HE wanted!" Jason looked like he wanted to spit in both their faces. ---Tim wasn't dead. It didn't matter what anyone said, he wasn't dead. Not to Dick. Or Dick loves his brother. He wants to do right by him. It doesn't land.

entry.title: Under The Willow
entry.summary:
Author: CarinoEresUnAmor

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,839Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 36

Summary: Red Robin, report."Bruce's voice filtered in through his comms as Tim tries to pry his eyes open, glancing around at his surroundings."I-"Tim started, wincing at the pain pounding against his skull. Wires, were the first thing he could recognize, they practically surrounded him, some stuck to his arms through his ripped sleeve like an IV would, some coming down from his head.He can't escape.

entry.title: Cortis [cor-tis, a noun] (another meaning of home)
